channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Deadly Russian strikes hit Kyiv as Zelenskyy urges US for urgent assistance
item.description: A large-scale overnight Russian missile and drone attack on Ukraine killed over a dozen people and injured more than 100, according to officials.

item.title: Usha Vance calls for respect toward Supreme Court and federal judges
item.description: The second lady expressed surprise at President Trump's sense of humor.

item.title: Russian missile and drone attack kills at least 13 in Ukraine, officials report
item.description: Russian missile and drone strikes kill at least 13 across Ukraine, as President Zelenskyy warned Moscow was planning a large-scale offensive.

item.title: Senior Iranian officer says return to war with U.S. seems inevitable
item.description: Prospects for a U.S.-Iran deal appear to dim as the Israel-Hezbollah conflict continues, despite Trump's claim of a ceasefire agreement.
